summary.narrative: Zhang Bulim Industrial Pte. Ltd. — a Zhang Xi / Zhang Family Trust-controlled PropCo — owns the JTC leasehold strata interest at Bulim Lane 2, #04-51/54, Singapore 648110 (700 sqm, Units #04-51/54, Cleantech Two, Jurong Innovation District). GoWell Energy Solutions Pte. Ltd. occupies the space as its corporate headquarters under an arm's-length related-party lease at SGD 4.00/sqft/month (SGD 361,680/yr; USD 268,858/yr). The PropCo structure separates the real estate economics from GoWell's operating business: Zhang owns the asset and earns rental income; GoWell pays market-rate rent and occupies the HQ. The DBS Bank mortgage (SGD 2.35M, SORA+1.35%, maturity 2028-09-30) provides leverage against the stable lease income. The related-party lease must be disclosed as a material related-party transaction in GoWell's U.S. listing prospectus (S-1/F-1), with rent benchmarked to JTC market rates via independent valuation.
summary.keyMessage: PropCo leaseback operational · NOI USD 234K (6.73% cap rate) · DBS mortgage matures Sep 2028 · Related-party lease requires SEC/auditor disclosure and third-party rent benchmark for U.S. listing

basicInfo.assetName: Bulim Lane Innovation HQ — Zhang PropCo Leaseback
basicInfo.assetType: Industrial / Commercial Strata — JTC Leasehold (PropCo Leaseback)
basicInfo.submarket: Jurong Innovation District (JID) — Cleantech Two, JTC
basicInfo.ownershipSummary: Zhang Bulim Industrial Pte. Ltd. (Zhang Xi 70% / Zhang Family Trust 30%); GoWell Energy Solutions Pte. Ltd. as arm's-length operating tenant (related-party lease)
basicInfo.landArea: Strata title — no separate land parcel
basicInfo.leaseTerms: 5-year lease + 3-year option; SGD 4.00/sqft/month (7,535 sqft); annual CPI escalation; GoWell responsible for utilities, security, IT infrastructure

actions.title: U.S. Listing Preparation — Corporate Asset Ring-Fencing & U.S. capital markets Disclosure
actions.recommendation: Engage KPMG / Deloitte to prepare independent valuation report for U.S. capital markets listing prospectus. Determine whether HQ strata unit is included within GoWell's listed entity perimeter or retained at family trust level. Disclosure obligations under MAS CG Code must be resolved before prospectus lodgement.
actions.decisionNeeded: Include HQ within U.S. listing entity or carve out to trust — decision required by CFO and legal counsel

actions.title: JTC Lease Renewal Planning — 12-Year Residual
actions.recommendation: Begin pre-renewal discussions with JTC Corporation approximately 3 years before expiry (Dec 2035). Given U.S. public listing proceedings, confirm whether JTC sub-lease consent is required for change in beneficial ownership following share listing.
actions.decisionNeeded: Confirm JTC change-of-control consent requirements with corporate secretary

actions.title: Fire Suppression System Upgrade — Annual Fire Safety Certificate
actions.recommendation: Annual SCDF-mandated FSC renewal completed March 2026. System compliant. No immediate action required.

topRisks.title: U.S. public listing Disclosure Risk
topRisks.impact: Non-disclosure or incorrect valuation of HQ in U.S. listing prospectus (S-1/F-1) could trigger U.S. capital markets regulatory action and delay listing timeline.

topRisks.title: JTC Lease Residual (12 yrs)
topRisks.impact: Declining lease term reduces financing options and may create refinancing or exit complexity post-2032.

topRisks.title: Market Value Softening
topRisks.impact: Jurong industrial strata values have underperformed central CBD; limited liquidity in secondary market.

marketSnapshot.submarket: JID Jurong Innovation District — Industrial Strata
marketSnapshot.assetVsMarket: Related-party lease at SGD 4.00/sqft/month (SGD 43.07/sqm/month); JID industrial strata market: SGD 3.80–4.20/sqft/month — subject lease at mid-market; independent broker certificate required for U.S. listing transfer-pricing documentation
